response.step_by_step_log: 1. OCR identified the song title "君と夏フェス" (Kimi to Natsu Fes) and songwriter "宮崎朝子" (Asako Miyazaki) at 00:04. 2. Performed a search with "Kimi to Natsu Fes SHISHAMO Japanese and English lyrics" to find the full lyrics. 3. Used the search results to populate the song title, artist, and full lyrics in Japanese and English. 4. Identified the second scene as a non-vocal dialogue interval.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance of the song "Kimi to Natsu Fes" by hololive members Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy, followed by a short dialogue interval in a backstage setting.

scenes.description: The hololive members perform "Kimi to Natsu Fes" on a stage designed to look like a school courtyard with a swimming pool. Title text appears at the start.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
まだ照れくさいあいつとフェスに
行く約束をしたわ
あまり乗ってたら引かれそう
控えめに楽しむって決めたんだ
でも私の大好きな
真夏のステージで
スーツを着たロックスター
もう我慢できない！
止まらないのは私の汗
それとも君への気持ち？
滴り落ちてく恋心
こぼれないようにすくってね
止まらないのは夏への期待
忘れられない、夏になるかも
夏の日差しで焼け焦げそう
すべてがスローモーションになる
他人の汗もどうでもよくて
日差しのうだるさも感じない
でも私の大好きな
真夏のステージで
スーツを着たロックスター
もう我慢できない！
ラストの曲終わり
ロックスター帰ってく
ライブが終わって我に帰って
それから…それから…
ずいぶん前のほうに来ちゃってたみたい
さっきまで二人がいた場所
もう違う景色
ああ、私やっちゃった
本気だったのに
うつむく私の隣に君が
私の目を見つめる君
時間が止まってるみたい
少し笑って君は言う
「新しい君が見れたから
今日は本当に来てよかった」
照れ笑いの奥見えちゃいそうで
私は焦って目をそらした
止まらないのは二人の恋だ
今年の夏よ
終わらないでよ。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I made a promise to go to a festival with that guy I'm still embarrassed with
Even if I did, if I get too excited I might turn him off
I decided to enjoy it with some reserve
But my favorite rock star
On a stage in the middle of summer
That rock star wearing a suit
I can't take it anymore
My sweat won't stop, or is it my feelings for you?
My love that flows and falls down
Scoop it up so it doesn't spill
My expectations for summer won't stop
I can't forget, it might be summer
Summer sunlight makes me feel like I'm burning
Everything is in slow motion
I don't care about others' sweat
I don't even feel the sweltering heat of the sunlight
But my favorite rock star
On a stage in the middle of summer
That rock star wearing a suit
I can't take it anymore
This is the last song, the rock star is going home
The live is over, going back to my usual self
And then... and then...
Looks like I came a bit too far ahead
To the place where the two of us were
It's a different scene
Oh, I did it
Even though I was serious
With you next to me looking down
Looking into my eyes, you look like time has stopped
You say with a small smile
"I'm glad I came today because I got to see a new you"
You might end up seeing my embarrassed grin
So I quickly looked away
Our love won't stop
Summer of this year, please don't end\

scenes.description: The performers move to a room and engage in a dialogue interval.
